//: GitHub Copilot CLI hook config — TEMPLATE. Copilot configures hooks in its CLI settings; the exact file location and key names vary by Copilot version, so VERIFY this against your installed version before relying on it. The intent: fire log-event.sh with the event name for each lifecycle event. Copilot event names are camelCase and differ from Claude Code (userPromptSubmitted, agentStop, errorOccurred). Copilot has no SubagentStop — agentStop brackets each agent run instead.
